race.comment: ENGINE OF WAR (1) resumed with a most encouraging run at Caulfield Heath over 1500m in a strongly run affair, back to the inside there and boxing on well for second. He showed good staying ability last time in work and will be fitter going slightly up in trip. LET IT BEEL (8) was a smart winner at Cranbourne last time out when well backed into $1.60. He can look to slot in just off the pace and measure right up. SATIRICALLY (3) is a lightly raced colt who won nicely on debut in a strong maiden, good in a BM72 at Randwick Kensington last time. He's promising and this looks an ideal race for him crossing from out wide. KAKADU SUNSET (7) was okay in Listed company in Adelaide last time but had been good fresh and will be hitting the line late. OBVIOUS (2) has been rock solid in two runs back and is in the mix.
